articles.title: Bettinna Carlos gives birth to twin sons
articles.description: Bettinna Carlos marked their family’s celebration of Father’s Day by revealing the arrival of her twin boys. The actress made the announcement by showing a photo of her sons wearing matching onesies in different shades of blue, through her Instagram page on Tuesday, June 21. She also shared a snap of her non-showbiz husband Mikki Eduardo carrying one of their newborns. “The best Father’s Day gift: our twins are finally home,” she said.
